"[1] ^CLEAR,STRONG WINDS, TRAVEL ADVISROY FOR ALL VEHICLES"
"[2] REDROCK RANDSBURG RD - CLOSED FROM SR14 TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE "
"[1] GARLOCK RD CLOSED- FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 // *** RESIDENTIAL ACCESS PERMITTED***"
"[3] LAST SEEN ON MAY 12,2026 AT APPROX 1700 HRS IN MOJAVE "
"[15] 12-S5 WILL HAVE EB #2 LANE SHUT DOWN UNTIL EDISON 97"
"[13] 12-S5 IMMEDIATE HAZARD - POLE STATES HIGH VOLTAGE [Shared]"
"[12] 12-S5 LOCATED CABLE APPEARS SOMETHING STRUCK IT, LIVE WIRES EXPOSED IN RDWY UNABLE TO GET POLE # DUE TO LIVE WIRES ON GROUND POSS STARS W/3 [Shared]"
"[10] WILL START WORKING ON CALL AND CB TO ADVS IF POLE IS THEIRS TO HANDLE IN THIS AREA [Shared]"
"[4] INVLD IN WHI TOYT CAM//2ND VEH WHI CHEV SLV"
"[2] FELL AND HIT RPS VEH AS WELL AS OTHER VEHS "
"[33] 1039 LASD - THEY WILL PICK UP FOR THIS CHARGE "
"[17] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 HOOKED ON TOW X 2 (909) 443-7017 [Shared]"
